name: Aurora Innovation, Inc.
business: Aurora develops and commercializes the Aurora Driver, a self-driving platform integrating hardware, software, and data services for autonomous vehicles. The company targets trucking, passenger mobility, and local goods delivery markets, initially launching driverless trucking operations.

exposures.sentence: We have launched and are continuing to develop the Aurora Driver based on what we believe to be the most advanced and scalable suite of self-driving hardware, software, and data services in the world to fundamentally transform the global transportation market.

This includes developing our Aurora FirstLight Lidar, which uses proprietary frequency modulated continuous wave (FMCW) technology that enables long-range sensing, and simultaneous detection of both the position and velocity of objects.
The computer powers Aurora's self-driving software, which plans a safe path of motion for the vehicle in order to reach its destination.
We have used a Verifiable AI approach, intended to leverage advancements in artificial intelligence and machine learning to deliver a practical, verifiable, and commercially scalable solution.

We launched trucking as our first driverless product, as we believe its massive scale, significant structural need, attractive unit economics, and self-similar operating environment will allow us to rapidly deploy and profitably scale on high-volume, highway-focused routes.

catalysts.event: Launch of Aurora Driver for Freight driverless commercial operations
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we launched driverless commercial operations with Hirschbach and Uber Freight and have since expanded our driverless customer cohort.

catalysts.event: Next-generation FirstLight Lidar expected launch in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Our next generation of lidar which we expect to launch in 2026 can see nearly four times as far as a traditional automotive lidar.
On July 30, 2025, the Company increased the aggregate dollar amount of the Company's Class A common stock that it may sell under the ATM Program to $1,421 million.
